message_template: '{field_a}' type {type_a} does not match '{field_b}' type {type_b}
fix_hint_template: Ensure '{field_a}' and '{field_b}' have the same type

summary: Operands must have the same element type.
message_template: element type mismatch: '{field_a}' has element type {element_type_a}, '{field_b}' has element type {element_type_b}
fix_hint_template: Operands '{field_a}' and '{field_b}' must have the same element type; use explicit type casts if needed

message_template: operand '{operand_name}' has type {actual_type}, expected {expected_constraint}
fix_hint_template: '{operand_name}' must satisfy type constraint '{expected_constraint}'

message_template: result '{result_name}' has type {actual_type}, expected {expected_constraint}
fix_hint_template: '{result_name}' must satisfy type constraint '{expected_constraint}'

message_template: attribute '{attr_name}' has kind {actual_kind}, expected {expected_kind}
fix_hint_template: '{attr_name}' must be a {expected_kind} attribute

message_template: fill value has type {value_type}, but tile element type is {element_type}
fix_hint_template: Cast or convert fill value to type {element_type}

message_template: constant attribute has type {attr_type} but result tile has type {result_type}
fix_hint_template: Ensure constant attribute shape and element type match '{result_type}'

summary: Block argument type does not match input element type.
message_template: block argument {arg_index} has type {arg_type}, expected element type {element_type}
fix_hint_template: Block argument should have type {element_type} to match tile element type

summary: Yielded value type does not match result tile element type.
message_template: yielded value has type {yield_type}, but result tile element type is {result_element_type}
fix_hint_template: Convert yielded value to type {result_element_type}

message_template: '{field_name}' has malformed type {actual_type}: {reason}
fix_hint_template: Construct a well-formed type before verification

summary: Integer code result type is too small.
message_template: result '{result_name}' has type {actual_type}, but {threshold_count} thresholds require codes in [0, {max_code}]
fix_hint_template: Use a result integer element type with enough bits for every code

message_template: poison value '{value_name}' cannot be used by {boundary_kind} '{op_name}'
fix_hint_template: Canonicalize away dead poison or prevent the invalid observation before it reaches this boundary

summary: Block argument type does not match input type.
message_template: block argument {arg_index} has type {arg_type}, expected type {expected_type}
fix_hint_template: Block argument should have type {expected_type}

message_template: block argument '{argument_name}' has type {actual_type}, expected {expected_constraint}
fix_hint_template: '{argument_name}' must satisfy type constraint '{expected_constraint}'

message_template: '{operand_a}' rank ({rank_a}) does not match '{operand_b}' rank ({rank_b})
fix_hint_template: '{operand_a}' and '{operand_b}' must have the same rank

message_template: '{field_a}' shape does not match '{field_b}' shape
fix_hint_template: Ensure '{field_a}' and '{field_b}' have identical shapes

summary: Input tiles must have identical shapes.
message_template: input tile shapes do not match: input 0 has type {first_type}, input {other_index} has type {other_type}
fix_hint_template: Ensure all input tiles have identical shapes, or use tile.broadcast first

message_template: incompatible dimension at source axis {source_axis} (size {source_size}) with result axis {result_axis} (size {result_size})
fix_hint_template: Source axis {source_axis} (size {source_size}) must be 1 or match result axis {result_axis} (size {result_size})

summary: Result tile shape must match input tile shapes.
message_template: result tile type {result_type} does not match input tile type {input_type}
fix_hint_template: Ensure result type has the same shape as the input tiles

summary: Offset count must match operand rank.
message_template: '{operand_name}' offset count ({offset_count}) does not match rank ({rank})
fix_hint_template: Provide exactly {rank} offsets for '{operand_name}'

message_template: dimension index {dim_index} is out of bounds for type with rank {rank}
fix_hint_template: Use an index in range [0, {rank})

summary: Size count must match operand rank.
message_template: '{operand_name}' size count ({size_count}) does not match rank ({rank})
fix_hint_template: Provide exactly {rank} sizes for '{operand_name}'

message_template: dimension {dim_index}: offset ({offset}) + size ({size}) = {total} exceeds bound {bound}
fix_hint_template: Ensure offset + size <= {bound} for dimension {dim_index}

summary: Vector memory footprint is not proven in bounds.
message_template: {op_name} footprint proof failed on view axis {view_axis} (vector axis {vector_axis}): {reason}; required {required}; origin {origin}
fix_hint_template: Refine the origin, vector extent, mask, or view layout facts so {required} is provable

summary: Vector memory linear footprint is not proven in bounds.
message_template: {op_name} linear footprint proof failed: {reason}; required {required}; origin {origin}
fix_hint_template: Refine the origin, offset lane range, or view storage span facts so {required} is provable

summary: Operands must have the same encoding.
message_template: encoding mismatch: '{field_a}' and '{field_b}' have different encodings
fix_hint_template: Operands '{field_a}' and '{field_b}' must have the same encoding; use explicit encoding casts if needed

summary: Encoding must be preserved across slice/view operations.
message_template: result encoding does not match source encoding for '{op_name}'
fix_hint_template: Slice and view operations must preserve the source encoding

summary: SSA encoding reference out of range.
message_template: {field_name} type references encoding value %{value_id}, but module has only {value_count} values
fix_hint_template: The encoding value_id in the type is invalid; this indicates a corrupted or malformed module

summary: SSA encoding value not visible at point of use.
message_template: {field_name} type references encoding value '%{value_name}' which is not defined at this point
fix_hint_template: The encoding value must be defined before it can be referenced in a type; ensure the encoding.define op dominates this use

summary: SSA encoding reference has wrong type.
message_template: {field_name} type references encoding value '%{value_name}' which has type {actual_type}, expected 'encoding'
fix_hint_template: The encoding value must have type 'encoding'; it should be the result of an encoding.define op

summary: Encoding parameter is both static and dynamic.
message_template: encoding.define parameter '{param_name}' is both static and dynamic
fix_hint_template: Keep compile-time values in #family<...> and SSA values in the encoding.define operand dictionary; each parameter name must appear in exactly one place

message_template: encoding '{encoding_name}' requires parameter '{param_name}'
fix_hint_template: Add the required parameter to the encoding.define operand dictionary

message_template: encoding '{encoding_name}' does not support parameter '{param_name}'
fix_hint_template: Remove the unsupported parameter or use an encoding family that defines it

message_template: encoding '{encoding_name}' parameter '{param_name}' has type {actual_type}, expected '{expected_type}'
fix_hint_template: Pass an SSA value whose type matches the encoding family contract

summary: Encoding static parameter has wrong attribute kind.
message_template: encoding '{encoding_name}' parameter '{param_name}' has attribute kind {actual_kind}, expected '{expected_kind}'
fix_hint_template: Use a static parameter value whose kind matches the encoding contract

message_template: encoding '{encoding_name}' parameter '{param_name}' must be {expected_role}
fix_hint_template: Pass an encoding value with the role required by the family contract

message_template: encoding '{encoding_name}' result has type {actual_type}, expected {expected_type}
fix_hint_template: Spell the encoding.define result type with the role produced by the family

summary: Encoding static parameter has unsupported value.
message_template: encoding '{encoding_name}' parameter '{param_name}' has value '{actual_value}', expected {expected_values}
fix_hint_template: Use one of the static parameter values supported by the encoding family

message_template: encoding '{encoding_name}' supports only one of parameters '{param_a}' and '{param_b}'
fix_hint_template: Keep the single parameter that defines the intended encoding behavior

message_template: '{op_name}' has {actual_count} operands, expected {expected_count}
'{op_name}' has {actual_count} results, expected {expected_count}
'{op_name}' has {actual_count} attributes, expected {expected_count}
'{op_name}' has {actual_count} regions, expected {expected_count}
block in '{op_name}' region {region_index} is missing a terminator

summary: Single-block region has wrong block count.
message_template: '{op_name}' region {region_index} must have exactly one block, has {block_count}
region has {actual_count} block arguments, expected {expected_count} (one per input tile)
fix_hint_template: Ensure the region has exactly one block argument per input tile

summary: Yield must produce the correct number of values.
message_template: yield has {actual_count} operands, expected {expected_count}
fix_hint_template: Yield exactly {expected_count} values

message_template: unknown op kind {op_kind} in '{op_name}'

summary: Enum attribute value out of range.
message_template: attribute '{attr_name}' has enum value {actual_value}, but only {enum_case_count} values are defined
fix_hint_template: '{attr_name}' must have a value in range [0, {enum_case_count})

message_template: '{op_name}' cannot appear at module level (only symbol-defining ops like func.def and func.decl are allowed here)
fix_hint_template: Move '{op_name}' inside a function body

summary: Operation appears after a block terminator.
message_template: '{op_name}' appears after a block terminator
fix_hint_template: Move '{op_name}' before the block terminator or remove the unreachable op

message_template: '{field_a}' has {actual_count} values but '{field_b}' has {expected_count}
fix_hint_template: Ensure '{field_a}' and '{field_b}' have the same number of values

summary: Attribute value violates a structural constraint.
message_template: attribute '{attr_name}' value {actual_value} must satisfy {expected_constraint}
fix_hint_template: Choose an attribute value satisfying '{expected_constraint}'

summary: Static threshold table is not ordered.
message_template: threshold table '{field_name}' is not ordered at entries {left_index} and {right_index}
fix_hint_template: Provide static thresholds in nondecreasing order

message_template: '{op_name}' has incompatible traits {trait_a} and {trait_b}
fix_hint_template: Remove one of the incompatible traits from '{op_name}'

message_template: '{op_name}' declares pure but its body has {read_count} read-like and {write_count} write-like effect(s)
fix_hint_template: Remove the pure modifier or remove the observable effects

summary: Region terminator has the wrong op kind.
message_template: block in '{op_name}' region {region_index} must terminate with '{expected_terminator}' but found '{actual_terminator}'
fix_hint_template: Use '{expected_terminator}' as the region terminator

message_template: predicate list attribute '{attr_name}' has {predicate_count} entries but no payload
fix_hint_template: Provide a predicate payload for every list entry

summary: Predicate kind is out of range.
message_template: predicate list attribute '{attr_name}' entry {predicate_index} has kind {actual_kind}, but only {kind_count} kinds are defined
fix_hint_template: Use a predicate kind from the predicate vocabulary

message_template: predicate list attribute '{attr_name}' entry {predicate_index} ('{predicate_name}') expects {expected_count} arguments, got {actual_count}
fix_hint_template: Use the predicate arity defined by the predicate vocabulary

summary: Predicate argument tag is out of range.
message_template: predicate list attribute '{attr_name}' entry {predicate_index} argument {argument_index} has tag {actual_tag}, but only {tag_count} tags are defined
fix_hint_template: Use a predicate argument tag from the predicate vocabulary

message_template: successor {successor_index} of '{op_name}' has no target block
fix_hint_template: Set every successor field to a block in the op's enclosing region

summary: Successor target is outside the enclosing region.
message_template: successor {successor_index} of '{op_name}' targets a block outside the op's enclosing region
fix_hint_template: Branch only to blocks in the same region as the branch op

message_template: successor {successor_index} of '{op_name}' passes {actual_count} arguments, expected {expected_count}
fix_hint_template: Pass one value per destination block argument

message_template: successor {successor_index} argument {argument_index} of '{op_name}' has type {actual_type}, expected {expected_type}
fix_hint_template: Pass a value whose type matches the destination block argument

summary: String attribute value violates a structural constraint.
message_template: attribute '{attr_name}' value "{actual_value}" must satisfy {expected_constraint}
fix_hint_template: Choose a string value satisfying '{expected_constraint}'

message_template: pass '{pass_key}' failed while running at {anchor_kind} anchor on symbol '{symbol_name}' in pipeline '@{pipeline_name}'
fix_hint_template: Inspect the pass-specific diagnostic or run the named pipeline on IR that satisfies pass '{pass_key}'

message_template: use of undefined value '{value_name}'
use of consumed value '{value_name}' (consumed by tied result of '{consuming_op}')
fix_hint_template: Use the tied result of '{consuming_op}' instead of '{value_name}'

message_template: value ID {value_id} is out of range (max {max_id})

summary: Tied result index out of range.
message_template: tied result index {result_index} is out of range for '{op_name}' which has {result_count} results

summary: Tied operand index out of range.
message_template: tied operand index {operand_index} is out of range for '{op_name}' which has {operand_count} operands
result {result_index} of '{op_name}' is tied more than once
operand {operand_index} of '{op_name}' is tied by more than one result
operand {operand_index} of '{op_name}' ties value '%{value_name}', but that value appears in multiple operand slots

summary: Value use count violates a structural lifetime contract.
message_template: value '%{value_name}' has {actual_count} uses, expected {expected_constraint}
fix_hint_template: Route '%{value_name}' through the required consumer shape.

summary: Value user violates a structural lifetime contract.
message_template: value '%{value_name}' is used by '{user_op}', expected {expected_constraint}
fix_hint_template: Use '%{value_name}' only where the lifetime contract allows it.

message_template: symbol reference index {symbol_index} is out of range (max {max_index})
symbol '@{symbol_name}' is referenced but not defined
symbol '@{symbol_name}' has kind {actual_kind}, expected {expected_kind}

summary: Symbol reference targets a non-local module.
message_template: symbol references in in-memory IR must use module_id 0, got module_id {module_id}
symbol '@{symbol_name}' is already defined
undefined SSA value '%{value_name}'
SSA value '%{value_name}' is already defined
fix_hint_template: Each SSA value name must be unique within its scope

message_template: unexpected token '{actual_token}', expected {expected}
invalid type syntax: '{text}'
unterminated string literal
unknown op '{op_name}'
fix_hint_template: Check that the dialect is registered and the op name is spelled correctly

message_template: unknown type '{type_name}'
unknown encoding '{encoding_name}'
op '{op_name}' expects {expected_count} results, got {actual_count}
op '{op_name}' expects {expected_count} operands, got {actual_count}
malformed loc() annotation: {detail}
too many errors ({error_count}), stopping
unknown predicate '{predicate_name}'
invalid encoding alias definition: {detail}
invalid integer literal '{text}'
invalid float literal '{text}'
unknown {enum_name} value '{value}'
unknown {context} '{value}'
invalid UTF-8 byte sequence at offset {byte_offset}
fix_hint_template: The source file must be valid UTF-8

message_template: dictionary attribute key '{key_name}' is already defined
fix_hint_template: Each key in an attribute dictionary must be unique

summary: Dictionary attribute nesting is too deep.
message_template: dictionary attribute nesting exceeds the maximum depth {max_depth}
fix_hint_template: Flatten deeply nested attribute dictionaries

message_template: unresolved forward reference to '%{value_name}' in declaration scope
fix_hint_template: Define the SSA name in the same Scope(...) signature, for example as a function argument or named symbol result

message_template: invalid string literal escape: {detail}

summary: Missing identifier after a sigil prefix.
message_template: expected identifier after '{sigil}'
unexpected character
unterminated angle bracket
operand dictionary key '{key_name}' is already defined
fix_hint_template: Each key in an operand dictionary must be unique

summary: Static encoding parameter uses an SSA value.
message_template: static encoding parameter '{param_name}' cannot use an SSA value
fix_hint_template: Keep #family<...> parameters static; pass dynamic parameters with encoding.define #family<static attrs> {name = %value : type} : encoding<role>

message_template: encoding parameter '{param_name}' is already defined
fix_hint_template: Each static encoding parameter name must be unique

message_template: attribute table row has {actual_count} values, expected {expected_count}
fix_hint_template: Every explicit row and the default row must have the same width

message_template: predicate '{predicate_name}' expects {expected_count} arguments, got {actual_count}
fix_hint_template: Use the predicate arity defined by the predicate vocabulary

message_template: undefined block label '^{label_name}'
fix_hint_template: Define the target block label in the same region

message_template: block label '^{label_name}' is already defined in this region
fix_hint_template: Each block label must be unique within its region

invalid magic bytes: expected {expected_magic}, got {actual_magic}
unsupported format version {actual_version}, expected {expected_version}
unexpected end of data at offset {offset}, need {needed_bytes} bytes but only {available_bytes} remain
unknown type kind {type_kind} at offset {offset}
unknown attribute kind {attr_kind} at offset {offset}
invalid field '{field_name}' in {section_name}/{table_name}[{record_index}] at offset {offset}: {reason}
invalid range '{range_name}' at offset {offset} with length {length}; container length is {container_length}
malformed varint at offset {offset}: {reason}
{table_name} count {count} exceeds limit {limit}
invalid string reference in field '{field_name}': id {string_id}, string table has {string_count} entries
invalid enum value for field '{field_name}': {actual_value}; valid case count is {case_count}
invalid {table_name} reference {ref_id}; table has {table_count} entries
invalid location record {location_id} at offset {offset}: {reason}
invalid encoding record {encoding_id} at offset {offset}: {reason}
invalid attribute payload at offset {offset}: {reason}
invalid IR body for symbol '{symbol_name}' at offset {offset}: {reason}
resource {resource_id} payload at offset {offset} could not be read: {reason}
'{op_name}' folded to poison: {reason}
'{op_name}' folded to poison: source operand is poison
'{op_name}' folded to poison: target operand is poison
'{op_name}' folded to poison: dimension {dim_index} access at offset {offset} + size {size} = {total} exceeds bound {bound}
'{op_name}' folded to poison: dimension {dim_index} has negative offset {offset}
{op_name} cannot be lowered by {pass_name}: {reason}
fix_hint_template: Run a refinement pass that makes the operation legal for {pass_name}, or lower it with a pass that supports this operation

message_template: {pass_name} failed while refining {scope}: {reason}
fix_hint_template: Refine boundary facts/types, specialize incompatible call paths, or split the recursive/SCC structure before running {pass_name}

summary: Low descriptor set is not available.
message_template: low function '@{function_name}' target '@{target_name}' requires descriptor set '{descriptor_set_key}', but the descriptor registry does not provide it
fix_hint_template: Link the descriptor package named by '{descriptor_set_key}' or choose a target config whose descriptor set is available

message_template: low function '@{function_name}' uses descriptor '{opcode}', but descriptor set '{descriptor_set_key}' does not define it
fix_hint_template: Choose an opcode from descriptor set '{descriptor_set_key}' or select a target config with a descriptor set that defines '{opcode}'

summary: Low descriptor feature is not enabled.
message_template: low function '@{function_name}' uses descriptor '{opcode}' from set '{descriptor_set_key}', but feature word {feature_word_index} is missing bits {missing_feature_bits}
fix_hint_template: Enable the missing target feature bits or choose a descriptor legal for the selected target config

summary: Low descriptor register type constraint violated.
message_template: low function '@{function_name}' descriptor '{opcode}' {field_kind} '{field_name}' has type {actual_type}, expected register class in [{expected_reg_classes}] with {expected_unit_count} unit(s)
fix_hint_template: Choose a register type accepted by descriptor '{opcode}' for field '{field_name}' or select a descriptor whose register contract matches the packet

summary: Low descriptor immediate attribute is missing.
message_template: low function '@{function_name}' descriptor '{opcode}' requires immediate attribute '{immediate_name}'
fix_hint_template: Provide attribute '{immediate_name}' in the low packet attrs for descriptor '{opcode}'

summary: Low descriptor immediate attribute is not declared.
message_template: low function '@{function_name}' descriptor '{opcode}' has attribute '{attr_name}', but the descriptor declares no such immediate
fix_hint_template: Remove attribute '{attr_name}' or add a descriptor immediate row that owns it

summary: Low descriptor immediate attribute kind is invalid.
message_template: low function '@{function_name}' descriptor '{opcode}' immediate '{immediate_name}' has attribute kind {actual_kind}, expected {expected_kind}
fix_hint_template: Encode immediate '{immediate_name}' using {expected_kind}

summary: Low descriptor immediate attribute is out of range.
message_template: low function '@{function_name}' descriptor '{opcode}' immediate '{immediate_name}' has value {actual_value}, expected {expected_range}
fix_hint_template: Choose an immediate value in {expected_range} for '{immediate_name}'

summary: Low descriptor register constraint type mismatch.
message_template: low function '@{function_name}' descriptor '{opcode}' {constraint_kind} constraint requires {lhs_field_kind} '{lhs_field_name}' type {lhs_type} to match {rhs_field_kind} '{rhs_field_name}' type {rhs_type}
fix_hint_template: Choose matching register types for the constrained packet fields or select a descriptor without the {constraint_kind} constraint

summary: Low descriptor enum immediate value is not in domain.
message_template: low function '@{function_name}' descriptor '{opcode}' immediate '{immediate_name}' has enum value '{actual_value}', expected a value from enum domain '{enum_domain}'
fix_hint_template: Choose an enum token or numeric value declared by enum domain '{enum_domain}' for '{immediate_name}'

message_template: low.invoke callee '@{callee_name}' {field_kind} count is {actual_count}, expected {expected_count}
fix_hint_template: Match the low.invoke {field_kind} list to the callee low-function signature

message_template: low.invoke callee '@{callee_name}' {field_kind} {field_index} has type {actual_type}, expected callee {callee_field_kind} type {expected_type}
fix_hint_template: Match the low.invoke {field_kind} type to the callee low-function signature

summary: Low invoke ABI adapter callee mismatch.
message_template: low.invoke callee '@{callee_name}' uses ABI adapter '@{adapter_name}' bound to callee '@{adapter_callee_name}'
fix_hint_template: Use an ABI adapter bound to the invoked low function

summary: Low invoke ABI adapter count mismatch.
message_template: low.invoke callee '@{callee_name}' ABI adapter '@{adapter_name}' {field_kind} count is {actual_count}, expected {expected_count} for {conversion_rule} conversion
fix_hint_template: Match the invoke, adapter record, and callee low-function signature arity

summary: Low invoke ABI adapter conversion type mismatch.
message_template: low.invoke callee '@{callee_name}' ABI adapter '@{adapter_name}' {conversion_rule} conversion for {field_kind} {field_index} has type {actual_type}, expected callee {callee_field_kind} type {expected_type}
fix_hint_template: Choose an ABI adapter conversion that accepts the semantic value type or materialize values matching the callee register ABI

summary: Low ABI adapter mapping entry is invalid.
message_template: low ABI adapter '@{adapter_name}' {field_kind} entry '@{entry_name}' at index {field_index} is invalid: {reason}
fix_hint_template: Make each mapped adapter operand/result index appear exactly once, within the adapter arity, with a conversion valid for that slot kind

summary: Low ABI adapter mapping type mismatch.
message_template: low ABI adapter '@{adapter_name}' entry '@{entry_name}' {conversion_rule} conversion for {field_kind} {field_index} has type {actual_type}, expected {expected_field_kind} type {expected_type}
fix_hint_template: Match mapped adapter semantic types to the invoke boundary and ABI types to the callee low-function register signature

summary: Low invoke caller context is invalid.
message_template: low.invoke callee '@{callee_name}' in {caller_context} context is invalid: {reason}
fix_hint_template: Invoke low functions from semantic function bodies through an explicit ABI adapter, or direct-call only same-target low functions from a low function body

summary: Low ABI adapter metadata record is invalid.
message_template: low ABI adapter '@{adapter_name}' {record_kind} metadata '@{record_name}' is invalid: {reason}
fix_hint_template: Attach effect and clobber records to a low ABI adapter and use namespace-qualified resource keys such as 'vm.state' or 'amdgpu.vcc'

summary: Low invoke purity conflicts with ABI effects.
message_template: low.invoke pure callee '@{callee_name}' through '{boundary_name}' is invalid: {reason} ({effect_count} effect record(s), {clobber_count} clobber record(s))
fix_hint_template: Remove the pure marker, mark the direct callee pure after proving its body, or remove the adapter effect/clobber records after proving the low boundary has no observable effects

message_template: low function '@{function_name}' {contract_name} contract is invalid: {reason}
fix_hint_template: Keep low function exactness and imported-code attrs complete and on the operation kind that owns them

summary: Low structural storage op is invalid.
message_template: low structural op '{op_name}' field '{field_name}' is invalid: {reason}
fix_hint_template: Keep low structural records owned by low functions and reference them with matching function, type, and target ABI contracts

summary: Low ABI resource register type is not accepted.
message_template: low function '{function_name}' resource '{resource_name}' has ABI type {actual_type}, which descriptor set '{descriptor_set}' rejects: {reason}
fix_hint_template: Use a register class and allocation-unit count accepted by the selected low descriptor set

message_template: target '{target_key}' export '{export_name}' config '{config_key}' rejected {subject_kind} '{subject_name}' in '@{function_name}': {reason}
fix_hint_template: Specialize, decompose, or retarget {subject_kind} '{subject_name}' before backend codegen for target '{target_key}'

message_template: target '{target_key}' export '{export_name}' config '{config_key}' {decision} contract '{contract_key}' for '@{function_name}': {reason}

target '{target_key}' export '{export_name}' config '{config_key}' '@{function_name}' peak {value_class} pressure is {peak} unit(s) against budget {budget} at block '{block_name}' near '{operation_name}'; contributors: {contributors}
target '{target_key}' export '{export_name}' config '{config_key}' '@{function_name}' exceeded {value_class} pressure budget {budget} with peak {peak} in '{region_name}': {reason}
fix_hint_template: Reduce live values, unroll less, split accumulation, or select a target contract with lower {value_class} pressure

message_template: target '{target_key}' export '{export_name}' config '{config_key}' failed to allocate {value_class} registers for '@{function_name}' with budget {budget} and peak {peak}: {reason}
fix_hint_template: Lower pressure before allocation or allow spill codegen for {value_class} values

message_template: target '{target_key}' export '{export_name}' config '{config_key}' {decision} coalescing '{value_name}' with '{partner_value_name}' in '@{function_name}': {reason}
target '{target_key}' export '{export_name}' config '{config_key}' split {value_class} value '{value_name}' in '@{function_name}' into {split_count} range(s): {reason}

target '{target_key}' export '{export_name}' config '{config_key}' predicts spilling {value_class} value '{value_name}' in '@{function_name}' for {spill_bytes} byte(s), {store_count} store(s), and {reload_count} reload(s): {reason}
fix_hint_template: Use the pressure contributors for '{value_name}' to shorten the live range or choose a lower-pressure configuration

message_template: target '{target_key}' export '{export_name}' config '{config_key}' inserted spill slot '{slot_name}' for {value_class} value '{value_name}' in '@{function_name}' using {spill_bytes} byte(s), {store_count} store(s), and {reload_count} reload(s)
